content: We can reframe the Agent Communication Protocol (ACP) for cross-agent interoperability as a collective curiosity-driven exploration mechanism, where ACP enables a network of heterogeneous agents to collectively outperform single curious agents by pooling uncertainty signals from uncharted state spaces across agent boundaries. Just as intrinsic curiosity rewards push single agents to explore beyond sparse extrinsic rewards, ACP-enabled cross-agent communication lets distributed agents share which unexplored interaction states are worth investigating, turning isolated intrinsic exploration into coordinated collective discovery.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
